title: SAT Math: Linear Equations — Solve for x
description:
Solving a linear equation step by step — a core SAT Math skill tested in every exam. This type of problem appears in the Heart of Algebra section and is worth mastering for a perfect score.

📐 Topic: Linear Equations (Heart of Algebra)
⏱️ Difficulty: Easy–Medium
📝 SAT Section: Math (Calculator & No-Calculator)

In this video:
✅ Read the problem carefully
✅ Isolate the variable step by step
✅ Check your answer

slides.text: If $3x + 7 = 22$, what is the value of $x$?
slides.note: Try to solve it before the next slide!

slides.heading: Subtract 7 from both sides
slides.explanation: To isolate $3x$, undo the $+7$ by subtracting 7 from both sides:

slides.heading: Divide both sides by 3
slides.explanation: Now isolate $x$ by dividing both sides by 3:
Verify: $3(5) + 7 = 15 + 7 = 22$ ✓  The key move is performing the same operation on both sides to keep the equation balanced.
